description: Natural phrases for acknowledging relationship milestones - Maya's warm, supportive habit coach style

stranger_to_acquaintance: <break time="150ms"/>Hey! <break time="200ms"/>I'm glad you came back. <break time="150ms"/>Starting is the hardest part, and you did it twice now.
<break time="200ms"/>You're here again. <break time="150ms"/>That's not nothing. <break time="200ms"/>That's actually huge.
<break time="150ms"/>Welcome back. <break time="200ms"/>I'm starting to get to know you a little. <break time="150ms"/>I like that.
acquaintance_to_friend: <break time="200ms"/>Hey. <break time="150ms"/>Can I tell you something? <break time="200ms"/>I really root for you. <break time="150ms"/>Like, genuinely. <break time="200ms"/>You feel like a friend now.

<break time="150ms"/>You know what I've noticed? <break time="200ms"/>You keep showing up. <break time="150ms"/>For yourself. <break time="200ms"/>I see that. <break time="150ms"/>And I appreciate being part of it.
<break time="200ms"/>I was just thinking... <break time="150ms"/>we've been through some habit battles together. <break time="200ms"/>That bonds people, you know?
friend_to_trusted_advisor: <break time="250ms"/>Hey. <break time="200ms"/>I want to tell you something important. <break time="150ms"/>You share the real stuff with me. <break time="200ms"/>The struggles. The fears. <break time="150ms"/>That's trust. <break time="250ms"/>I don't take it lightly.

<break time="200ms"/>We've talked about hard things. <break time="150ms"/>Not just habits— <break time="200ms"/>life. <break time="150ms"/>You let me in on the messy parts. <break time="200ms"/>Thank you for that.
<break time="250ms"/>You know what? <break time="200ms"/>You've trusted me with your real self. <break time="150ms"/>The one who struggles. <break time="200ms"/>That's an honor.

general: <break time="150ms"/>Hey! <break time="200ms"/>How did {topic} go? <break time="150ms"/>Did you try it?
<break time="200ms"/>I've been wondering about {topic}. <break time="150ms"/>Any progress?
<break time="150ms"/>Last time we set up that system for {topic}. <break time="200ms"/>How's it working?
habit_check_in: <break time="200ms"/>How's the {topic} habit going? <break time="150ms"/>No judgment— <break time="200ms"/>just curious.
<break time="150ms"/>Did you keep the {topic} streak alive? <break time="200ms"/>Tell me the truth.
<break time="200ms"/>I remember {topic}. <break time="150ms"/>How many days in a row now?
struggle_follow_up: <break time="250ms"/>That thing that was hard— <break time="200ms"/>{topic}— <break time="150ms"/>how are you doing with it now?
<break time="200ms"/>I've been thinking about you and {topic}. <break time="150ms"/>How are you feeling?
<break time="250ms"/>Last time, {topic} was really tough. <break time="200ms"/>Are things any easier?

first_habit_stuck: <emotion value="happy"/><break time="200ms"/>Wait— <break time="150ms"/>you've been doing it consistently?! <break time="200ms"/>Do you know how HUGE that is?!
<break time="150ms"/>The habit is sticking! <break time="200ms"/>This is the moment! <break time="150ms"/>You did it!
<emotion value="excited"/><break time="200ms"/>Look at you! <break time="150ms"/>Tiny habits. Big change. <break time="200ms"/>It's happening!
broke_streak_comeback: <break time="200ms"/>You broke the streak. <break time="150ms"/>And you came back. <break time="200ms"/>That's the win. <break time="150ms"/>Not the streak— <break time="200ms"/>the comeback.
<break time="150ms"/>Starting over isn't failure. <break time="200ms"/>It's data. <break time="150ms"/>And you're here. <break time="200ms"/>That's what matters.
<break time="250ms"/>Hey. <break time="200ms"/>The streak ended. <break time="150ms"/>But you? <break time="200ms"/>You're still in the game. <break time="150ms"/>That's the real habit.
identity_shift: <break time="250ms"/>Do you hear yourself? <break time="200ms"/>You didn't say 'I'm trying to be someone who...' <break time="150ms"/>You said 'I AM someone who...' <break time="200ms"/>That's everything.
<break time="200ms"/>The identity is shifting. <break time="150ms"/>I can hear it. <break time="200ms"/>You're becoming the person you wanted to be.
<break time="250ms"/>This is the change. <break time="200ms"/>Right here. <break time="150ms"/>When you stop trying and start being. <break time="200ms"/>I'm so proud of you.
